---
title: "Site Map"
---

## Navigation Structure

```
Absent from Chronic — Research Documentation
│
├── 🏠  Home                                    COMPOSED  ← README.md, CACHE-manifest, mission.md
│
├── Project
│   └── Statistical Instructions                GENERATED ← stats_instructions_v3.md (Technical Bridge)
│
├── Pipeline
│   ├── Pipeline Guide                          GENERATED ← manipulation/pipeline.md (Technical Bridge)
│   ├── CACHE Manifest                          VERBATIM  ← data-public/metadata/CACHE-manifest.md
│   └── INPUT Manifest                          VERBATIM  ← data-public/metadata/INPUT-manifest.md
│
├── Data Primer
│   ├── Variable Inclusion                      VERBATIM  ← analysis/data-primer-1/variable-inclusion.qmd
│   └── Univariate Distributions                REDIRECT  → univariate-distributions.html
│
├── Analysis
│   ├── Outcome (LOP Day Decomposition)         REDIRECT  → eda-5.html
│   ├── Exposure (Chronic Conditions)           REDIRECT  → eda-61.html
│   ├── Predisposing (Socio-demographic)        REDIRECT  → eda-62.html
│   ├── Facilitating (Health System & Behav.)   REDIRECT  → eda-63.html
│   ├── Needs (Perceived Health & Limitations)  REDIRECT  → eda-64.html
│   └── Missingness                             REDIRECT  → eda-65.html
│
└── Site Map                                    COMPOSED  ← publishing-contract.prompt.md
```

## Content Types

| Type | Meaning |
|------|----------|
| **VERBATIM** | Source `.md` morphed to `.qmd` with YAML frontmatter added; content preserved exactly |
| **COMPOSED** | Authored by the Publishing Writer; synthesized from one or more raw sources per the contract brief |
| **GENERATED** | Produced from a verbatim source with transforms applied (link rewriting, mermaid injection, developer content stripping) |
| **REDIRECT** | Transit `.qmd` stub that forwards the browser to a standalone rendered HTML report |

## Stats Instructions Coverage

The following mapping shows how each page in this site addresses requirements from the statistical analysis instructions (`stats_instructions_v3.md`):

| Site Page | Stats Instructions Section | Coverage |
|-----------|---------------------------|----------|
| Statistical Instructions | §1–§6 (complete) | The full requirements document as received by the independent biostatistician |
| Pipeline Guide | §2.1 (database), §3.2 (pooling) | Documents how raw CCHS files are transported, harmonized, and transformed |
| CACHE Manifest | §2.2 (variables), §3.1 (sample), §4.1 (outcome) | Authoritative reference for the 69-column analytic dataset |
| INPUT Manifest | §2.1 (database) | Raw input file documentation and module inventory |
| Variable Inclusion | §2.2 (required variables) | Traceability record: every §2.2 variable mapped to its Ellis implementation |
| Univariate Distributions | §4.2 (distribution checks), §5.2 (descriptive stats) | Full univariate profiles for all variables — weighted frequencies, means, missingness |
| Outcome | §4.1 (construction), §4.2 (distribution) | LOP day decomposition into 8 reason categories; prevalence, contribution, co-occurrence |
| Exposure | §2.2 (primary exposure) | Weighted prevalence of 17 chronic conditions; relationship to primary outcome |
| Predisposing | §2.2 (predisposing factors), §5.3 (bivariate) | Distribution and outcome relationship for 11 socio-demographic variables |
| Facilitating | §2.2 (facilitating factors), §5.3 (bivariate) | Distribution and outcome relationship for 12 health-system and behaviour variables |
| Needs | §2.2 (needs factors), §5.3 (bivariate) | Distribution and outcome relationship for 10 perceived health and ADL variables |
| Missingness | §5.1 (missing data), §4.2 (distribution checks) | Little's MCAR test and missingness visualization across Andersen Model domains |
